skills.name: research-agent
skills.description: Multi-source deep research with synthesis and inline citations. Structured workflow: clarify, decompose, search, synthesize.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: rag-evaluator
skills.description: Evaluate RAG pipeline quality across faithfulness, relevance, and hallucination. Finds where your RAG breaks before users do.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: code-reviewer
skills.description: Five-axis structured code review: correctness, security, performance, maintainability, test coverage. Severity-labeled findings.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: debug-agent
skills.description: Systematic root cause analysis: build a feedback loop first, then hypothesize, instrument, fix. No guessing.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: test-writer
skills.description: Write thorough, meaningful tests — happy path, edge cases, error cases, integration. Tests that actually catch bugs.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: pr-summarizer
skills.description: Generate clear pull request descriptions from diffs: what, why, how, test plan, and risks. Context-first, not diff-first.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: cost-tracker
skills.description: Track, estimate, and optimize LLM API costs across OpenAI, Anthropic, Bedrock, and Gemini. Finds your biggest cost drivers.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: sql-agent
skills.description: Write, optimize, and explain SQL queries. Covers query plans, index strategy, schema design, and safety for PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: doc-generator
skills.description: Generate accurate README files, API docs, inline docstrings, and changelogs. Documentation developers actually read.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: yc-job-tracker
skills.description: Track and score AI/ML engineering jobs at YC startups. Daily refresh, relevance scoring, and new-posting alerts.
skills.author: chandrudp29
